posts.text:
🚨BREAKING: Gen-Z is now MORE ENGAGED in Church than Boomers, per a new Barna study.

This is thanks to President Trump platforming JESUS and welcoming Gen-Z to talk about God.

God bless you, Mr. Best President.

Thank you!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

Don't believe the fake news attacks on @TulsiGabbard.

Leftists and RINOs are attacking her because she was on-site when the Trump FBI seized Fulton County, GA 2020 ballots.

The STOLEN 2020 election will be exposed!

God bless Trump and Tulsi.🙏

Video

🚨BREAKING: Kamala Harris just insinuated Queen of Rap @NICKIMINAJ doesn’t know “2 + 2 = 4” and only supports President Trump because of “misinformation.”

Kamala, this is why both times you ran for President you lost badly.

Nicki is much smarter than you.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: The incredible @DBongino just DESTROYED Leftists and RINOs on LIVE TV.

"You do not know jack SQUAT about this guy [Trump] if you think he is getting dog walked by anyone. He’s the one WALKING the damn dog!"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Plane fulls of illegal aliens are being deported and flying out of Minneapois to where they came from thanks to ICE's deportations.

This is what I voted for!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

I'm so looking forward to going on Fox & Friends First tomorrow morning.

Gen-Z supports President Trump more now than ever before.

Make sure to tune in!

🚨BREAKING: The House of Representatives just PASSED a bill that requires the AUTOMATIC DEPORTATION of any illegal alien that commits welfare fraud.

This is what I voted for!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: CNN just ADMITTED President Trump has a 100% APPROVAL RATING with the MAGA GOP.

In addition, the MAGA GOP has GROWN since November 2024.

Congratulations, Mr. Best President!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Over 2.2 MILLION people have seen @JamesOKeefeIII's BOMBSHELL investigation on X alone exposing FRAUD cash for ballots.

This is just PART 1! The mainstream media is, of course, ignoring this.

Share to make this GO VIRAL!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: VP @JDVance just DOUBLED DOWN on the SAVE America Act and put a fake news reporter in their place.

"If what you mean by intervening in the election is we want voter ID before voting in this country? Yes!"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BEAUTIFUL: Sen. Mullin just told a heart-touching story of how President Trump called countless times, offered his personal plane, and even personally visited  his son in 2020 after a traumatic brain injury.

God bless Trump.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Not even a week into office and Chile’s president has already begun building their border trenches to deter illegal migration.

President Trump has made a WORLDWIDE impact!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: These United States supposed "allies" just PROVED themselves to be freeloaders and proved President Trump right.

We shouldn't be supporting these countries if they're not going to support us.

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Viewership for the Oscars PLUMMETED 9% with just 17.9 million viewers, making it the lowest viewed Oscars since 2022.

Meanwhile, @NICKIMINAJ just surpassed 800 MILLION STREAMS on Spotify in 2026.

32.6 million watched President Trump's SOTU.

Follow: @BoLoudon

🚨BREAKING: Tom Homan just called out Democrats for only being anti-ICE because the Democrat voter base of ILLEGAL ALIENS is being deported.

"We're ruining their long-term plans for power for decades to come!"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: A Senate Democrat just said the QUIET PART OUT LOUD as to why they oppose the SAVE America Act:

"This bill is about stopping groups from voting who tend to vote for Democrats!"

Illegal aliens can't be voting...

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump is continuing to apply pressure to Senate Republicans to VOTE to PASS the SAVE America Act.

"The biggest thing coming up is a SAVE America Act in the Senate!"

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: Republican Sen. Barrasso just SLAMMED any Republican and Democrat Senators refusing to vote for the SAVE America Act.

"We're going to put ALL of them on the record."

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: President Trump's White House just agreed to some reasonable Democrat terms in exchange for them voting to re-open DHS.

If Democrats don't agree to this, they're absolutely insane.

No one works harder than TRUMP!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video

🚨BREAKING: The U.S. Senate just voted 51-48 to MOVE FORWARD with the common sense, much-needed SAVE America Act.

Senate Republicans, Don't give up until it's FULLY PASSED!

Follow: @BoLoudon

Video
